spec.query:
power = from(bucket: "cpms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "power")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "totalPower")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["category"] == "chiller")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "power"}))

load = from(bucket: "cpms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flow")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["category"] == "chiller")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["deviceId"] == "cwHeader")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "energyFlowRate")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "coolingLoad", _value: r._value * 78.986}))

union(tables: [power, load])
  |> pivot(rowKey: [], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["coolingLoad", "power"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with efficiency: if r.coolingLoad > 0.0 then r.power / r.coolingLoad else 0.0 }))

from(bucket: "cpms")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "flow")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["category"] == "chiller")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["deviceId"] == "cwHeader")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "energyFlowRate")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with coolingLoad: r._value * 78.986}))
  |> drop(columns: ["_value"])

spec.description: Grafana URL for the Chiller Alarms dashboard
spec.name: cpms_alarm_dashboard_url
